title: Rei from 10 and 20 is Rei II
display_title: Rei from 10 and 20 is Rei II
wikitext:
[]: Rei from 1.0 and 2.0 is Rei II?             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sun Jun 30, 2013 11:57 am I think I have proof that the Rei from the first two films is the second Rei clone. Maybe somebody has seen this already, but since there are often people speculating, I´m not sure. In Eva 2.22, minute 44:11, "REI-02" is written on Rei´s collar. This could mean that it is the second Rei. Sorry if this was found already. I saw this here: http://www.taringa.net/posts/info/6309794/Detalles-de-Evangelion-2-22-que-no-viste.html It´s in spanish, but the pictures are often enough to understand. There is also one for 3.33: http://www.taringa.net/posts/info/16692739/Detalles-de-Evangelion-3-33-que-no-viste.html

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sun Jun 30, 2013 12:21 pm The Rei-02 could also be referring to the fact that Lilith is the 2nd angel. Really we have no firm evidence of there ever being any Rei-I in Rebuild, aside from the tenuous case of Eva-00 going berserk -- if that.

[]:             Quote Post by Th3Marauder » Sun Jun 30, 2013 12:43 pm ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: The Rei-02 could also be referring to the fact that Lilith is the 2nd angel. Really we have no firm evidence of there ever being any Rei-I in Rebuild, aside from the tenuous case of Eva-00 going berserk -- if that.

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Sun Jun 30, 2013 1:19 pm Th3Marauder wrote: ... Isn't the Rei in 1.11 and 2.22 being Rei II firm evidence that a Rei I existed?

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Sun Jun 30, 2013 1:19 pm Th3Marauder wrote: ... Isn't the Rei in 1.11 and 2.22 being Rei II firm evidence that a Rei I existed?

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sun Jun 30, 2013 1:34 pm Off topic, but good find with that link kuribo-04! There is some details that I don't think were noticed in 3.0, I will put them in the "Things you noticed thread"!

[]:             Quote Post by TruthfulLie » Sun Jun 30, 2013 1:44 pm Knowing that there are multiple clones of Rei from what we've seen in Q, doesn't the collar serve as a evidence to support the existence of Rei I? or at least some sort of predecessor to the Rei we see during 1.0 and 2.0? (Probably and not necessarily the same concept of Rei I from NGE though) Also little off topic but doesn't Rei look younger in her picture that's on the new Nerv ID card Ritsuko gives to Shinji? (or is it just me?)

[]:             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sun Jun 30, 2013 5:47 pm ElMariachi wrote: Off topic, but good find with that link kuribo-04! There is some details that I don't think were noticed in 3.0, I will put them in the "Things you noticed thread"!

[]:             Quote Post by Th3Marauder » Mon Jul 01, 2013 12:09 am But we see her collar in 2.22, it has Rei II on it, what more could we want?

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Mon Jul 01, 2013 1:56 am That's my opinion too, but this is EGF we're talking about. No matter how obvious it seems, someone will not be convinced.

[]:             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Mon Jul 01, 2013 9:55 am TruthfulLie wrote: Also little off topic but doesn't Rei look younger in her picture that's on the new Nerv ID card Ritsuko gives to Shinji? (or is it just me?)

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Mon Jul 01, 2013 10:05 am Maybe the Rei clones are also suffering from the "curse of Eva". Or possibly the severed heads used to be the 14-year-old clones in the Reiquarium (if it does exist in NME) and once they were all dead ReiQ was produced, and grew to maturity over the 14-year-timeskip.

[]:             Quote Post by Th3Marauder » Mon Jul 01, 2013 10:10 am Monk Ed wrote: That's my opinion too, but this is EGF we're talking about. No matter how obvious it seems, someone will not be convinced.

[]:             Quote Post by TruthfulLie » Mon Jul 01, 2013 10:18 am kuribo-04 wrote: I don't think so, she's probably just drawn like that, but this made me notice something else. In NGE we saw Rei I grow up, she died, and probably Rei II continued growing up. Later we saw the Reiquarium, and every Rei clone was the same. That made me think that they all were created at the same time. But now in Q we see Rei, 14 years later, still 14 years old. Do they just produce 14 year old Reis now? The heads looked all the same...

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon Jul 01, 2013 1:49 pm The Ayanami types would make rather poor artificial soldiers if you ended up with a toddler each time you had to replace one; But what good is it to age them beyond the 13/14/15 prime age bracket for eva pilots? Also, it's just better if they have a similar degree of maturity, for coverup purpose, though that point has been moot since the NERV/WILLE split. What we saw in the trailer might have been half-finished ones. For the sake of fanwank, I'd say that the shy-looking one on the right is a young ReiQ XD Either way, since they can be created at 13/14 and the curse of eva won't let them age past 15, Rei Q could technically be any age between 13 and a few weeks old, through its probably more likely to be less than more, given the indications for the existence of numerous interim-Reis. It may simply be Q's beefed up budget/the level of love and detail it gives to depicting the human body (seen most with Shinji, and any sort of hands), but it kinda goes out of its way to depict ReiQ with that "long", slim, elegant/"elvish" build, even if it doesn't match the inside at all, but I get the feeling that ReiQ might be supposed to be physically Mari's or Kaworu's age (15 apparently being the maximum the curse lets you get to) ...her boobs seem minimarly bigger. Closer to Yui's size, if you will.
